description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows, a driveway leading to a garage, and a fenced yard featuring green lawns and several trees. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a small garden. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The front facade features a driveway, garage, and a small entryway, while the rear showcases a more open recreational space. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, fenced yard, and both front driveway and backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a portion of the green lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, wooden fencing, and multiple windows along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, outdoor furniture, and garden area within the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full extent of the wooden fence, trees, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
